meta.name: Subhaan Shaikh
meta.title: Backend & Systems Engineer
meta.tagline: I build reliable backend systems, scalable architectures, and cloud-native infrastructure, with a passion for high-performance engineering.
meta.about:
I am a final-year Computer Engineering student at Vidyavardhini's Bhausaheb Vartak Polytechnic with a 98.00% (5th Sem) academic record, and a Software Development Intern at DeeplogicAI. In my professional role, I build internal engineering tools and optimize server services, prioritizing workflow efficiency, robust security, and clean documentation.

While I confidently navigate the full development stack (managing frontend interfaces, mobile applications, and AI integrations), my true passion and core strength lie in backend architecture and cloud scalability. I thrive when designing resilient systems, leveraging Docker and Kubernetes to ensure seamless, containerized deployments and robust performance. Backed by a strong foundation in Python, C++, and JavaScript, I continuously sharpen my algorithmic logic through competitive problem-solving on LeetCode and HackerRank(Maths).

Whether working remotely or on-site, I bring clear communication, strong ownership, and a dedication to continuous learning. Currently exploring the intersection of cloud technologies and Agentic AI, I am actively seeking new professional opportunities to drive impactful technological solutions as a backend-focused full-stack developer.
meta.philosophy: I pick tools for correctness and performance, not hype. That's why I'm learning Rust.

bullets: Architected and deployed internal engineering tools and backend microservices with senior engineers, reducing manual developer operations and decreasing deployment cycle time.
Implemented industry-standard security protocols, API documentation, and automated code-review processes.
Engineered task orchestration and automation frameworks for complex backend workflows.
Developed code obfuscation and minification strategies, enabling secure intellectual property protection during deployment to on-premises enterprise solutions.
Built a unified cross-platform push notification API that integrates Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) and Apple Push Notification Service (APNs) for Android, iOS, and Web as a microservice.
Designed and integrated a client grading system using a Weighted Recency Scoring algorithm, and integrated it into the admin panel.
Configured Linux server environments and Docker containers for PDF processing and generation using Puppeteer.
Integrated and certified third-party logistics APIs (FedEx, DHL) to enable production-ready shipping and tracking.

projects.title: HealthEasy
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Healthcare Ecosystem
projects.problem: Healthcare professionals need fast, AI-assisted clinical decisions without compromising patient data privacy.
projects.description: Full-stack hospital management system with RAG-based clinical assistant, voice-to-text prescriptions, drug interaction checker, dosage calculator, and chest X-ray ML analysis with local GPU inference. Built across web (React) and mobile (Expo React Native) with a Convex BaaS backend. Patient data stays on-device via Tailscale VPN — no cloud exposure for sensitive records. Evaluated retrieval quality across 5 RAGAS metrics before any clinical demo.
deepDive: Chose local GPU inference over cloud APIs so patient data never leaves the device — HIPAA-aligned by design, not retrofit
Tailscale VPN creates an end-to-end encrypted tunnel between inference server and clients — zero open ports, zero cloud exposure
RAGAS evaluation pipeline (Faithfulness, Answer Relevancy, Context Precision, Context Recall, Correctness) ran before any clinical demo — not as an afterthought
ChromaDB vector store with semantic chunking for medical document retrieval

projects.title: Civic Grievance Platform
projects.subtitle: Geo-tagged Issue Routing for Indian Municipalities
projects.problem: Public complaints about potholes, sewage, and civic issues have no reliable routing to the correct authority — they fall into generic portals and get lost.
projects.description: Rule-based grievance routing engine that maps geo-tagged citizen reports to the correct municipal, district, or state authority using PostGIS jurisdiction polygons loaded with Maharashtra and Palghar district data. AI acts as a tiebreaker only when boundaries overlap — not the primary router. Geospatial backend already live.
deepDive: Chose PostGIS over simple lat/lng lookup because jurisdiction boundaries are polygons — a pothole 2m across a border must go to the right ward
Rule-based routing first — AI tiebreaker invoked only on boundary-overlap cases, keeping inference costs near zero for 90%+ of complaints
Palghar district and Maharashtra jurisdiction polygon data loaded and indexed
Routing engine designed to extend across all Indian states — not Maharashtra-only

architecture.title: Civic Grievance — System Flow
architecture.notes: Incoming geo-tagged reports hit the FastAPI gateway, which validates and passes coordinates to PostGIS for jurisdiction polygon lookup. The Rule Engine resolves 90%+ of complaints directly. Boundary-overlap cases invoke an AI tiebreaker before routing to the correct Municipal, District, or State authority.

projects.title: CampusEasy
projects.subtitle: Agentic Academic Platform
projects.problem: Fragmented institutional data — notices, marks, deadlines — scattered across siloed systems with no unified student interface.
projects.description: Cross-platform SaaS ecosystem centralizing institutional data across Android, iOS, and Web. Agentic voice RAG system using LangChain and FastAPI lets students query institutional data via natural language. Anti-spoof attendance with 6-second QR refresh + DeviceID tracking. Local LLM inference via Ollama for institutional deployment without cloud dependency.

projects.title: KrushiNet
projects.subtitle: Digital Farmers Marketplace
projects.problem: Indian farmers lack a direct digital marketplace — produce pricing is opaque and middlemen dominate distribution.
projects.description: Full-stack agricultural marketplace with real-time commodity price APIs from government data, MongoDB inventory management, and Cloudinary image uploads for product catalogs. JWT + Bcrypt auth. Built under 24-hour hackathon constraints to production-ready quality — advanced to National Round 2.

projects.title: EVI
projects.subtitle: Electronic Verification Interface
projects.problem: Manual credential verification in recruitment is slow, error-prone, and cannot scale to high application volumes.
projects.description: Automated credential verification pipeline using Tesseract.js OCR for image-based extraction and PDF Parse for document handling. Validates educational certificates, work experience proofs, and qualifications in real-time with structured audit logs for compliance.

projects.title: Android Network Blocker
projects.subtitle: Stealth DNS-based VPN App
projects.problem: No rootless Android solution exists that silently blocks network traffic by DNS without surfacing in recent apps.
projects.description: Stealth Android app built in Kotlin using VpnService and DNS-only architecture. Blocks network traffic at the DNS level without root access. Includes a Learn Mode that observes app traffic patterns before enforcing rules. No UI visible in recent apps — designed for silent background operation.

projects.title: Planeta
projects.subtitle: Sustainable Tourism Platform
projects.problem: Eco-tourists have no unified platform to calculate trip carbon footprint and offset it through verified programs.
projects.description: Eco-tourism platform with carbon emission calculator across multiple transport modes (flights, cars, ships, trains), interactive eco-certified hotel discovery via Leaflet.js maps, and verified carbon offset marketplace. State-level finalist at BitNBuild.
projects.hackathon: BitNBuild Around The World — State Finalist
